source_text: I encounter the description of a cook pushed into a fire [2.1], a clear failure of physical safety that endangered a worker and caused suffering [2.2]. The decision not to fire an executive accused of sexual assault [2.7][2.8] exposes how unequal power [2.4] shields violators from accountability. Details of falsified cooking origins [3.3] reveal a deeper dishonesty extending beyond staff treatment to consumer relations.
translation: Ich stoße auf die Beschreibung eines Kochs, der in ein Feuer gestoßen wurde [2.1], ein klares Versagen der körperlichen Sicherheit, das einen Arbeiter gefährdete und Leid verursachte [2.2]. Die Entscheidung, einen der sexuellen Belästigung beschuldigten Manager nicht zu entlassen [2.7][2.8], zeigt auf, wie ungleiche Machtverhältnisse [2.4] Täter vor der Rechenschaftspflicht schützen. Details über gefälschte Herkunftsangaben von Speisen [3.3] offenbaren eine tiefere Unaufrichtigkeit, die über den Umgang mit dem Personal hinaus bis in die Kundenbeziehungen reicht.

source_text: I encounter the description of a cook pushed into a fire [2.1], a clear failure of physical safety that endangered a worker and caused suffering [2.2]. The decision not to fire an executive accused of sexual assault [2.7][2.8] exposes how unequal power [2.4] shields violators from accountability. Details of falsified cooking origins [3.3] reveal a deeper dishonesty extending beyond staff treatment to consumer relations.
translation: Encuentro la descripción de un cocinero empujado hacia un fuego [2.1], un claro fallo de seguridad física que puso en peligro a un trabajador y causó sufrimiento [2.2]. La decisión de no despedir a un ejecutivo acusado de agresión sexual [2.7][2.8] expone cómo el poder desigual [2.4] protege a los infractores de la rendición de cuentas. Los detalles de la falsificación del origen de los alimentos [3.3] revelan una deshonestidad más profunda que se extiende más allá del trato al personal hacia las relaciones con los consumidores.

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Apprendre qu'une fillette de cinq ans a été blessée par balle et a dû subir une intervention chirurgicale d'urgence me rend pleinement conscient des conséquences concrètes du manquement au maintien de la sécurité physique [2.1]. La suspicion de la police concernant l'implication de gangs fait passer cet acte d'une violence isolée à un modèle de méfaits graves qui relève des interdictions contre les comportements criminels létaux [2.7]. Savoir que la victime est un enfant me contraint également à reconnaître que les populations vulnérables nécessitent des mesures de protection accrues, en particulier lorsque leurs vies sont menacées par autrui [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Sapere che una bambina di cinque anni è stata colpita da un colpo di arma da fuoco e ha dovuto sottoporsi a un intervento chirurgico d'urgenza mi rende profondamente consapevole delle conseguenze reali del mancato rispetto della sicurezza fisica [2.1]. Il sospetto della polizia di un coinvolgimento di bande eleva questo evento da atto di violenza isolato a un modello di gravi illeciti che rientra nei divieti contro la condotta criminale letale [2.7]. Sapere che la vittima è una bambina mi impone inoltre di riconoscere che le popolazioni vulnerabili richiedono tutele rafforzate, specialmente quando le loro vite sono minacciate da altri [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Известие о том, что пятилетняя девочка была ранена в результате стрельбы и была вынуждена перенести экстренную операцию, заставляет меня остро осознать реальные последствия неспособности обеспечить физическую безопасность [2.1]. Подозрения полиции в причастности банд переводят это происшествие из разряда единичных актов насилия в категорию систематических серьезных правонарушений, подпадающих под запреты на смертельно опасное преступное поведение [2.7]. Тот факт, что жертвой является ребенок, также заставляет меня признать, что уязвимые группы населения нуждаются в усиленных мерах защиты, особенно когда их жизни находятся под угрозой со стороны других людей [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: 5歳の少女が撃たれ、緊急手術を受けなければならなかったと聞き、身体的安全を維持することに失敗した際の実社会における結末を痛切に実感しています [2.1]。警察がギャングの関与を疑っていることは、これが単なる孤立した暴力ではなく、致死的な犯罪行為の禁止に該当する重大な不正行為のパターンであることを示しています [2.7]。被害者が子供であると知ることは、特に他者によって命を脅かされる可能性がある場合、脆弱な人々にはより高度な保護策が必要であることを認識させます [5.2]。

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: 听说一名五岁女孩中弹并不得不接受紧急手术，这让我敏锐地意识到未能维护人身安全所带来的现实后果 [2.1]。警方对其涉帮派活动的怀疑，使这一事件从孤立的暴力行为上升为一种属于禁止致命犯罪行为范畴的严重违法模式 [2.7]。得知受害者是一名儿童，也迫使我认识到弱势群体需要更高程度的保护，尤其是当他们的生命受到他人威胁时 [5.2]。

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Zu hören, dass ein fünfjähriges Mädchen angeschossen wurde und sich einer Notoperation unterziehen musste, macht mir die realen Konsequenzen eines Versagens bei der Gewährleistung der körperlichen Sicherheit [2.1] schmerzlich bewusst. Der polizeiliche Verdacht einer Beteiligung von Banden hebt dies von isolierter Gewalt zu einem Muster schwerwiegenden Fehlverhaltens, das unter die Verbote tödlichen kriminellen Verhaltens fällt [2.7]. Zu wissen, dass das Opfer ein Kind ist, zwingt mich zudem zu der Erkenntnis, dass schutzbedürftige Bevölkerungsgruppen verstärkte Schutzmaßnahmen benötigen, insbesondere wenn ihr Leben durch andere bedroht wird [5.2].

source_text: Hearing that a five-year-old girl was shot and had to undergo emergency surgery makes me acutely aware of the real-world consequences of failing to uphold physical safety [2.1]. The police suspicion of gang involvement elevates this from isolated violence to a pattern of serious wrongdoing that falls under prohibitions against lethal criminal conduct [2.7]. Knowing the victim is a child also compels me to recognize that vulnerable populations require heightened safeguards, especially when their lives are threatened by others [5.2].
translation: Escuchar que una niña de cinco años recibió un disparo y tuvo que someterse a una cirugía de emergencia me hace plenamente consciente de las consecuencias en el mundo real de no mantener la seguridad física [2.1]. La sospecha policial de la participación de pandillas eleva esto de un acto de violencia aislado a un patrón de conductas delictivas graves que entran en las prohibiciones contra la conducta criminal letal [2.7]. Saber que la víctima es una niña también me obliga a reconocer que las poblaciones vulnerables requieren salvaguardas reforzadas, especialmente cuando sus vidas se ven amenazadas por otros [5.2].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Je note que le texte fait référence à l'invocation de lois fédérales et étatiques [6.1] pour traiter de la vente de produits contrefaits, ce que le passage considère comme une violation relevant d'un acte répréhensible grave lié à la propriété [2.7].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Noto che il testo fa riferimento all'invocazione di leggi federali e statali [6.1] per affrontare la vendita di prodotti contraffatti, che il brano tratta come una violazione rientrante in gravi illeciti relativi alla proprietà [2.7].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: Я отмечаю, что в тексте упоминается применение федеральных законов и законов штатов [6.1] для пресечения продажи контрафактной продукции, что в данном отрывке рассматривается как нарушение, подпадающее под категорию серьезных правонарушений в сфере собственности [2.7].

source_text: I note the text references federal and state laws being invoked [6.1] to address the sale of counterfeit products, which the passage treats as a violation falling under serious property-related wrongdoing [2.7].
translation: 偽造品の販売に対処するために、連邦法および州法が援用されていること[6.1]に言及する。本文では、これは重大な財産関連の不正行為に該当する違反として扱われている[2.7]。
